sync.title: Sync & Updates
sync.description: Configure background pulling and which update feed Tolaria follows. Stable only receives manually promoted releases, while Alpha follows every push to main.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose the app color mode used for Tolaria chrome, editor surfaces, menus, and dialogs.

autogit.title: AutoGit
autogit.description: Automatically create conservative Git checkpoints after editing pauses or when the app is no longer active.
autogit.unavailable: AutoGit is unavailable until the current vault is Git-enabled. Initialize Git for this vault first.
autogit.enableDescription: When enabled, Tolaria will commit and push saved local changes automatically after an idle pause or after the app becomes inactive.

titles.title: Titles & Filenames
titles.description: Choose whether Tolaria automatically syncs untitled note filenames from the first H1 title.
titles.autoRename: Auto-rename untitled notes from first H1
titles.autoRenameDescription: When enabled, Tolaria renames untitled-note files as soon as the first H1 becomes a real title. Turn this off to keep the filename unchanged until you rename it manually from the breadcrumb bar.

aiAgents.title: AI Agents
aiAgents.description: Choose which CLI AI agent Tolaria uses in the AI panel and command palette.
aiAgents.notInstalled: is not installed yet. You can still select it now and install it later.

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.description: Choose whether Tolaria shows the Inbox workflow, plus how it moves through items while you triage them.
workflow.organizeDescription: When enabled, an Inbox section shows unorganized notes, and a toggle lets you mark notes as organized.
workflow.autoAdvanceDescription: When enabled, marking an Inbox note as organized immediately opens the next visible Inbox note.

privacy.title: Privacy & Telemetry
privacy.description: Anonymous data helps us fix bugs and improve Tolaria. No vault content, note titles, or file paths are ever sent.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for Tolaria's interface.

aiPanel.title: AI Chat
aiPanel.notAvailable: {{agent}} is not available on this machine
aiPanel.installHint: Install it or switch the default AI agent in Settings
aiPanel.notInstalledPlaceholder: {{agent}} is not installed. Open AI Agents in Settings.
aiPanel.emptyWithContext: Ask about this note and its linked context
aiPanel.emptyWithContextAgent: Ask {{agent}} about this note and its linked context
aiPanel.emptyNoContext: Open a note, then ask the AI about it
aiPanel.emptyNoContextAgent: Open a note, then ask {{agent}} about it
aiPanel.subtitleNoContext: The AI will use the active note as context

welcomeScreen.welcomeSubtitle: Markdown knowledge management for the age of AI
welcomeScreen.vaultMissingSubtitle:
The vault folder could not be found on disk.
It may have been moved or deleted.
welcomeScreen.templateRequiresInternet: Requires internet — clone later. Suggested path: {{defaultVaultPath}}
welcomeScreen.cloningTemplate: Cloning the Getting Started vault template
welcomeScreen.createEmptyDescription: Start fresh in an empty folder with Tolaria defaults
welcomeScreen.preparingDefaults: Preparing Tolaria defaults in the selected folder
welcomeScreen.openFolderDescription: Point to a folder you already have
welcomeScreen.downloadingGettingStartedTemplate: Downloading the Getting Started vault template…

searchPanel.keyHint: Enter to open · Esc to close

statusBar.mcpNotConnected: External AI tools not connected — click to set up
statusBar.claudeCodeNotFound: Claude Code not found — click to install
statusBar.addRemoteToVault: Add a remote to this vault
statusBar.noRemoteConfiguredTooltip: This git vault has no remote configured. Commits stay local until you add one.
statusBar.historyGitOnly: History is only available for git-enabled vaults

banner.conflictNote: This note has a merge conflict
banner.renameDetectedMessage_one: {{count}} file renamed outside Tolaria. Update wikilinks?
banner.renameDetectedMessage_other: {{count}} files renamed outside Tolaria. Update wikilinks?

cloneVault.title: Clone Git Repo
cloneVault.description: Clone any remote repository into a local vault folder. Tolaria uses your existing system git configuration for authentication.
cloneVault.cloningStatus: Cloning repository… Tolaria will open the vault when git finishes.
cloneVault.authHint: SSH keys, the git credential manager, `gh auth`, and other system git auth methods all work.

commitDialog.localDescription: This vault has no git remote configured. Tolaria will create a local commit only.
commitDialog.pushDescription: Review changed files and enter a commit message before committing and pushing.

conflictResolver.title: Resolve Merge Conflicts
conflictResolver.description_one: {{count}} file has merge conflicts. Choose how to resolve each file.
conflictResolver.description_other: {{count}} files have merge conflicts. Choose how to resolve each file.
conflictResolver.shortcutHint: K = keep mine · T = keep theirs · O = open · Enter = commit

gitRequired.heading: Git repository required
gitRequired.description: Tolaria uses a git repository to track changes, detect moved files, and keep your vault safe. We'll create a local repo — no remote needed.

createType.title: Create New Type
createType.description: Create a type document so notes of this type can inherit templates and metadata.
createType.typeNameHint: Creates a type document. Its properties become defaults for new docs of this type.

createNote.title: Create New Note
createNote.srDescription: Enter a title and choose a type for the new note.

createView.editSrDescription: Update the name, icon, and filters for this saved view.
createView.createSrDescription: Create a saved view by choosing a name, icon, and filter rules.

addRemote.title: Add Remote
addRemote.description: Connect this local vault to a git remote. Your existing local commits stay intact; Tolaria will only connect the vault when the remote history is safe to use.
addRemote.helpText: Use an empty repository or one created from this vault. SSH keys, Git Credential Manager, and other system git auth methods all work.

noteRetargeting.typeDescriptionWithoutEntry: Select a type for the active note.
noteRetargeting.folderDescriptionWithoutEntry: Select a destination folder for the active note.

toast.gettingStartedCloned: Getting Started vault cloned and opened at {{path}}
toast.couldNotOpenNote: Could not open "{{title}}" in this window
toast.aiGuidanceRestoreFailed: Failed to restore Tolaria AI guidance: {{error}}

dialog.title: Contribute to Tolaria
dialog.description: Pick the path that fits what you want to do! Any type of help is appreciated

featureRequests.title: Feature requests
featureRequests.description: Search on the product board first, upvote an existing idea if already there, and only create a new post when genuinely new!
featureRequests.label: Product Board

discussions.title: Discussions
discussions.description: Use GitHub Discussions for questions, broader conversations, idea sharing, and community context that is not a concrete bug report.
discussions.label: GitHub Discussions

contributeCode.title: Contribute code
contributeCode.description: Small, focused pull requests are welcome. Check planned or in-progress work first so you are building in the right place.
contributeCode.label: GitHub Pull Requests

bugReport.title: Report a bug
bugReport.description: Explain how to reproduce, what you expected, and what actually happened. Check for duplicate bugs first. Attach the sanitized diagnostic bundle please!
bugReport.label: GitHub Issues
bugReport.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable right now. You can still open GitHub Issues directly.

telemetry.title: Help improve Tolaria
telemetry.body: Send anonymous crash reports to help us fix bugs faster. No vault content, no personal data, no tracking.
telemetry.neverCollectVault: No vault content, note titles, or file paths
telemetry.neverCollectPersonal: No personal data or IP addresses
telemetry.changeAnytime: You can change this anytime in Settings.

connected.title: Manage External AI Tools
connected.description: Tolaria is already connected to external AI tools for this vault. Reconnect to refresh the configuration, or disconnect to remove Tolaria from those third-party config files.

notConnected.title: Set Up External AI Tools
notConnected.description: Tolaria can add its MCP server to external AI tools for this vault, but it will not touch third-party config files until you confirm here.

body.entryFilesPrefix: Confirming this action will write or update Tolaria's single
body.explanationSuffix: , while Tolaria also refreshes the legacy Claude MCP file for compatibility with older setups. Cancel leaves all files untouched, reconnect is idempotent, and disconnect removes Tolaria's entry again.

checking.title: Checking AI agents
checking.description: Checking which AI agents are available on this machine.

notDetected.title: No AI agents detected
notDetected.description: Tolaria works best with a local CLI AI agent installed.

ready.title: AI agents ready
ready.description: Your AI agents are ready to use in Tolaria.

aiAgents.claudeInstallHint: Install Claude Code or continue without it.

installed.title: Claude Code detected
installed.description: Tolaria's AI features are ready to use.

missing.title: Claude Code not detected
missing.description: Tolaria works best with an AI coding agent installed.
missing.installHint: Install Claude Code to enable AI-powered note management.

checkingStatus.title: Checking for Claude Code
checkingStatus.description: Checking whether Claude Code is available on this machine.

noteListChanges.discardDescription: Discard changes to {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
